metadata.description: Public skills for working with Grafana, Prometheus, Loki, Tempo, and the broader LGTM stack
metadata.documentation: This marketplace manifest must remain identical to the plugin manifests in .claude-plugin/ and .cursor-plugin/. Keep all three manifests in sync.

plugins.name: grafana-core
plugins.description: Skills for core Grafana concepts — dashboards, panels, PromQL, and visualization

plugins.name: grafana-cloud
plugins.description: Skills for Grafana Cloud — fleet management, cloud integrations, adaptive metrics, and AI agent connectivity

plugins.name: grafana-lgtm
plugins.description: Skills for the LGTM open-source stack — Loki (logs), Grafana Tempo (traces), Grafana Mimir/Prometheus (metrics), and Grafana Pyroscope (profiles)

plugins.name: grafana-plugins
plugins.description: Skills for building Grafana plugins — bundle optimisation, code splitting, React 19 migration, and the @grafana/scenes framework

plugins.name: grafana-app-sdk
plugins.description: Skills for building apps on the Grafana App Platform using grafana-app-sdk — CUE schemas, reconcilers, and admission control

plugins.name: grafana-k6
plugins.description: Skills for working with k6 — open-source load testing and performance testing documentation
